author: Luciën J.
pros: Reftab is a great package what creates and gives ease of use of asset management. It's structured and clear.
cons: I'm missing some features such as bulk transfer or bulk assign to user but that's quite it, further it's quite neatly build!

review_title: Would Recommend to anyone with a moderately large inventory they are keeping track of
description: my experience is positive overall. it has greatly improved the way we manage assets as well as our ordering and asset destruction habits
author: Joe L.
pros: Love the inventory management features that also allow us to send alerts when low on items. it's highly customizable. as someone in IT, the ability to integrate with our environment using the built in autopilot and dell integrations is also a much appreciated feature.
cons: you can't have more than one window open at a time. very annoying especially when trying to see assets while also attempting to print asset labels for them.

review_title: Great Software but has room for improvement.
description: Overall, it's better than what we had before. Not sure if we'll be keeping it long-term as it's expensive and I think there is room for improvement.
author: Brandon B.
pros: I like that it has strong integration with Intune and Entra ID. I also like the automated processes for assigning assets to users based on Intune.
cons: Lack of customization. For example, when we term an employee, it would be nice if Reftab could automatically assign their assets to a "returning to stock" status automatically. Furthermore, some of the built in templates and asset fields we don't use but we can't remove them. Its pricing model is also a bit expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Largely positive from a technical point of view, some bugs and issues but always responded to quickly by the development team
author: Dominick H.
pros: Functionality for asset and license management - stock auditing and checking in/out is noticeably easier than other asset management systems
cons: The user portal doesn’t work well at all on mobile devices, and making reservations for multiple assets isn’t very streamlined

description: Very enjoyable, specially since it's been a great way to track all of our IT assets in one place and not have to dig for info in different locations as we can add it all in there
author: Gabriel A.
pros: I liked that everything is very straight forward when adding assets or anything like a loanee. Also really liked the way things are named, and you are able to know what you are searching for just from looking at the tab names
cons: It seems that some of the API pulls don't actually get all the data from the place connected, not sure why, but it means that there is some random people that I have end up adding.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Elias J.
pros: Easy to check out and check in equipment. Custom device information is a large bonus. Device history is also a plus so you can see how equipment was handled prior to being lent out the latest time.
cons: Certain user screens are difficult to navigate as they do not direct you to anywhere. An example of this is when you go to Loanees and click on a user and can see their loan history, but you cannot directly click on any item. At this point you have to copy the ID and paste it into the search to find more information.

author: Vibhore S.
pros: Easy to manage, straightforward. Easy to track and navigate around and add details and manage multiple assets
cons: Limited assets to add, sometimes multiple loanees can cause system to overload and cause delays to load.

review_title: Great for keeping tabs on assets
description: RefTab have always been very helpful. The platform is easy to navigate and most of it is self explanatory. I would definitely recommend to anyone looking for a system which can create QR or bar codes for all their assets and for assigning assets either in bulk or singly, this is the app for you.
author: Georgina S.
pros: I have been using RefTab for a few years now but haven't really used it to its full capacity. It does a lot more than I gave it credit for. I like that it keeps track of all our assets and we know exactly where they are and where they have been. I also like that it can send emails on your behalf to the loanees (a feature I have only just worked out with the help of a very informative and knowledgable member of their team ([sensitive content hidden], thank you for your patience and clear instructions).
cons: I don't like that I couldn't schedule an email for every six weeks. But that's not too much of an issue. As of last week I didn't even know it could send any, lol.

review_title: Great reservation portal and easy management
description: We use this daily at my university for checking in and out expensive materials for the students. It is very helpful for keeping track of our materials and easy to use for the students.
author: Beth D.
pros: It is very user friendly. The reserve function is very useful for our students as they often need the same materials, so they can reserve on the day that works best for them.
cons: I don't like generating my own BAR-CODEs. It would be nice to have an auto generation for that so you know you're not duplicating it but also the option to change it if you wanted to.

description: Overall, very good. I will continue to use, and recommend to anyone who needs a better system to track their equipment.
author: Daniela V.
pros: Reftab is easy to use. The user interface is straightforward. I was able to organize all our tech inventory in a month. The thing i like best is that you can create QR codes to attach to items and then use the phone app for quick checkout. Making equipment easy to track.
cons: The reports could be better. I find that are difficult to manage and customize to get exactly what I need.

description: It's been great. Setup was easy, the interface is mostly intuitive, and support and any communication has been great.
author: John D.
pros: The integrations. They save so much time and potential for errors in the data. Also being able to trust what's actually imported into Reftab.
cons: I wish there was a way to set up a two way sync for certain assets. For example, it's handy to have VM's located in Intune stored in Reftab, but would be nice to hvae a means to clean them up. As well as some of the hardware information from Intune that can't be mapped. Also things would be nice to have like the Apple warranty information, but I know we're at Apple's mercy with the API there.

review_title: The be all end all of inventory app
description: it's the central be all end all software we are using here for all assets management, software management, offboarding and onboarding stuff.
author: Martin F.
pros: I am using Reftab since 2021 and IT IS one of the best, if not THE best user friendly webapp for assets management and inventory i ever work with
cons: the only cons was the green only color :D but now there is colors option! But to be serious, the are numerous changes and upgrade every now and then so i have no cons.

description: Really good experience! I'm sticking with this one!
author: Nick S.
pros: Good set of features Barcode generation and scanning Easy to use Good UX Fair plan limits
cons: No ability to hide tabs/modules that you don't use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall Reftab has been a five star product. Very easy and simple to use. If you aren't able to figure a task out they have helpful documents explaining each process step by step or customer service is very responsive and friendly to work with.
author: Devin C.
pros: Easy to understand and use. This software is very simple and straight forward and very customizable.
cons: You can't change the fields in the LDAP sync to custom fields such as Screen size etc. If importing machines you can't have the asset status set to in stock automatically. Which means you have to go to each asset and change the status manually. You can make a Workflow Automation that changes the asset status automatically for any new asset added after creation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quality Product at a Reasonable Price
description: Being able to track all assets, accessories, and consumables throughout our organization has been a game changer and will help us eliminate each department having their own spreadsheets for tracking which employees have what.
author: Stefania M.
pros: It's easy to use and reasonably priced. The fact that it can track assets, accessories, consumables, and licenses in an easy way with the ability to grant users access only to what they should be able to see was a deciding factor in selecting Reftab over other competitors.
cons: The lack of report customization and the inability to filter accessories from consumables.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reftab is making my IT life easier!
description: Very positive. Customer service was very helpful and knowledgeable. Asset creation was a breeze, and I enjoy using the interface.
author: Kyle L.
pros: Easy to use, clean and fast interface, mobile app allows for asset signing and tagging in the field.
cons: I'm looking forward to more integrations. Some of the integration tutorials were outdated. Some UI customization would be nice, like themes or a dark mode.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product, even better vender with great customer service
description: We have been using RefTab for over a year now at our 9 campuses across the university. Its a great product and simplified our way of tracking University assets. We moved from a different vender which was becoming too costly for us to maintain so migrated to Reftab. The onboarding of Reftab was excellent and we have built a great relationships with the project and support team members at Reftab. We were well supported throughout with regular catch ups and support for the development team. Compared to our previous product we have also reduces our internal support tickets to our Application team by more than 50%. in the last year we have had 30 tickets raised to the central teams which have all been minor issues like user error or training. Our previous product for the 8 month in 2024 had 71 ticket. From a centralised management point of view we are very impressed by the service and support received and our technicians within the campuses have all found RefTab to be a far better product than our previous application.
author: Liz M.
pros: The features on Reftab have supported us so well over the last year. Some of the many features we like are: Tenants: which allows us to have our Campuses under separate tenants and support us with different opening times, time zones and different ways of working we have across the University API design: we rely heavily on the API to integrate booking information with our timetabling platform. We have had a very positive experience using the API and its supporting documentation UI: Having customisable portal for our users really helps with our multiple brands and the staff view is well designed and easy to navigate. User provisioning: We are able to configure this all via the UI which makes the set up and maintenance much more efficient compared to our last vender.
cons: I don't think there are any Cons, any gaps that have been identified have been quickly resolved and Reftab have been very reactive to include enhancements that support not only us but their other customers.

author: Kartik K.
pros: Asset and Inventory Management has been a breeze. The Team has been responsive and very helpful. The Tool is easy to use for our end clients as well as our internal team.
cons: Nothing specific. The Solution doesn't have any specific bugs or issues. As and when something comes up, the Support Team is helpful and prompt to resolve.

review_title: Excellent Asset Tracking with Great Azure Integration and Support
description: Reftab has streamlined our asset management significantly. The Azure integration works flawlessly with our existing infrastructure, and the QR code labels have made check-ins/check-outs so much faster. The iPhone app is reliable and easy to use on the go. What really stands out is their support team - they're knowledgeable and actually care about helping you succeed. It's been a solid investment for our organization.
author: Matthew P.
pros: The seamless Azure integration and QR code labeling system make asset tracking incredibly efficient. The iPhone app is intuitive and works great in the field, and whenever I've needed help, their support team has been responsive and genuinely helpful in resolving issues quickly
cons: No major complaints. Like any software, there's always room for UI refinements, but nothing that impacts daily functionality

review_title: Great Asset Manager with Azure integration
description: Good pilot, converted, full usage was easy with our team. Was easy to do Office 365 license inventory and Intune assets with manufacture warranty
author: Mike A.
pros: SCIM integration, ease of use. Onboarding process for integrations helped assets import from Intune easily
cons: Cost for assets needs to be more clear, separation for sub companies. Pilot had limitation for number of assets
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great software that does what we need a service. The support is great. Things are sorted very quickly when there has been issues.
author: Philip M.
pros: Simple to use and quick to learn. Great support!
cons: Cant print labels for accessories when looking at the accessory you need to go out and into all of the accessories. We need to generate labels for our stock and its really annoying.

description: Our clients are satisfied with the deployment and so far all feedback is quite positive. We hope to continue working with Reftab.
author: Stuart Z.
pros: Integrations and automations, customizability as well. The integrations make workflow more efficient.
cons: Field mapping is limited per se and reporting could cover more areas. Unfortunately stock fields cannot be removed either.

review_title: Flirted with alternatives, but Reftab is worth sticking with
description: I really believe that this service should be as well known as the most popular solutions, and it really deserves to be.
author: Adam M.
pros: Quite simply, the developers are so responsive, that issues and suggestions are acted upon and that makes such a difference to the product today. The flexibility of fields and categories means that it could fit all possible use cases. The self service portal is really handy and user friendly. Settings are plentiful so you can get things as close as you can to how you want it. It's simple, yet powerful and has so so much potential. We were looking at the better known alternatives whilst testing reftab as there were a few niggles and add-on which should be as part of the standard package (when compared to competitors) but this is all resolved and I'm really glad we stuck by it.
cons: Reporting is a little lacklustre, it is basically a filter and that's about it. It would be good to see formatted, client friendly reports, as well as checkout receipts, packing lists, hire terms and other handy supplementary paperwork. The accessories feature could do with a bit of TLC as it feels like there is a lot of potential, but doesn't quite integrate with the rest of the ecosystem properly yet. I think the logo looks like a push chair!

description: RefTab is a plug and play option for companies wanting more control over their asset management. It was simple to understand and onboard our team. I highly recommend the trial option for anyone who wants to try out this option. It's very intuitive.
author: Anna B.
pros: We started using RefTab to help support the development of our humanitarian trips and found it to be a critical key to increasing our capacity. The ease of onboarding was a #1 priority and I was able to search for everything I needed to set up. The import functions were also very, very easy to use and helped tremendously.
cons: I don't have any cons at the moment. We did not pay for the highest level so maintenance options are slim. I would like more of that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Increased efficiency in tool tracking, maintenance, and deployment into the field. We typically inventory tools every 6 months. this makes the process a breeze.
author: James O.
pros: Easy to use. I love that it is cloud based, so I can access it from anywhere. Extremely customizable, from categories to workflows to reports. Support team is highly responsive.
cons: app functionality is a little behind the browser based version.
